prompt: Write a Python script that: (1) queries the IntAct database REST API for all Influenza A virus–Homo sapiens protein-protein interactions with IMEx curation, (2) filters for experimentally validated interactions (MI:0096 pull-down, MI:0018 two-hybrid, or MI:0006 anti-bait coimmunoprecipitation), (3) constructs a bipartite interaction network separating viral from host proteins, (4) computes host protein degree centrality and identifies putative dependency factors, (5) performs GO enrichment analysis on the top-30 host hub proteins using g:Profiler API, (6) outputs: interaction table CSV, bipartite network GraphML, and GO enrichment bar chart. Include requests rate-limiting and a README with data provenance.
source_citation: Derived from IntAct (2024_10) and g:Profiler; target: Influenza A virus–host interactome; organism: Influenza A / Homo sapiens; catalogue version v1.0
